title: Accreditation and Processing of Workers in Sectors or Industries that
content: 42 Intersect with the Land-based Sector. The Department shall issue separate guidelines 43 on the accreditation of principals and the processing of workers in sectors or industries 44 with workplace characteristics that intersect with the land-based sector, including, among 45 others, occupations in the intermodal sector. 46 47 48 EMPLOYMENT STANDARDS 49 50 51 Formulation of Standard Employment Contracts 52 53
